message:
fix(core): add ConcurrencyLimitReached to WorkflowStartResult proptest strategy

The WorkflowStartResult enum gained a ConcurrencyLimitReached variant
but the proptest strategy and match arms weren't updated. Add it to
both the arb_workflow_start_result() strategy and the JSON type-field
assertion. All 44 proptest_workflows_expanded tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
